auth.tosBody: between Player and Backer. VBacker is NOT a financial institution, does NOT hold funds, does NOT provide payment services. All monetary transactions are executed off-platform via lawful means in Vietnam. VBacker is not responsible for the content, timing or method of payment between parties. I commit to comply with Vietnamese law and agree to the
auth.tosRequired: You must agree to the Terms of Service and Privacy Policy.
auth.displayNameMin: Display name must be at least 2 characters
auth.duplicateName: Name "{{name}}" is already taken. Please pick a different name.
auth.verifyEmailSent: Verification email sent! Please check your inbox to complete sign-up.
auth.passwordMin: Password must be at least 6 characters

verifyEmail.title: Verify your email
verifyEmail.sentTo: We sent a verification link to
verifyEmail.openLink: Please open the email and click the link to complete sign-up.
verifyEmail.noEmail: Didn't receive the email? Check Spam or contact support.
verifyEmail.resentOk: Verification email resent. Please check your inbox.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.p1aTail: between Player and Backer for lawful poker staking activities in Vietnam.
terms.p1b: VBacker is NOT a financial institution, does NOT hold user funds, does NOT provide payment services, does NOT issue cryptocurrency.
terms.p2a: All monetary transactions among Player, Backer and Club are executed directly off-platform via lawful payment methods in Vietnam (bank transfer, cash, USDT TRC-20 on the parties' own wallets).
terms.p2b: VBacker is not responsible for the content, timing, payment method, or any financial dispute among the parties.
terms.p3: Users commit to complying with Vietnamese law when using the platform. VBacker reserves the right to suspend or terminate accounts upon detecting violations.
terms.p4: VBacker provides the service on an "as-is" basis. We do not guarantee the service will always be uninterrupted or error-free.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.l1: Account information: email, display name, password (encrypted).
privacy.l2: Player/Backer profile: ROI, ITM, staking deal history.
privacy.l3: USDT TRC-20 wallet address self-declared by the user.
privacy.l4: In-platform chat history to support dispute resolution.
privacy.p2: Data is only used to operate the Player-Backer connection platform, display public information per user settings, and handle disputes when needed.
privacy.p3: VBacker does NOT sell personal data to third parties. Data is only shared with infrastructure providers (database, email) for operations.
privacy.p4: You have the right to request access, correction, or deletion of your personal data by contacting Admin via Zalo/Telegram support.
privacy.p5: Passwords are encrypted and connections use HTTPS. However, users are also responsible for keeping their passwords and wallet addresses confidential.

transfer.tronOnlyBody: Transferring on the wrong network (BEP-20, ERC-20, …) = funds permanently lost. On Binance: Withdraw → USDT → Network: TRX (TRC-20).

bankroll.title: Bankroll Manager
bankroll.loginRequired: Sign in to use Bankroll Manager.
bankroll.moveDownDesc: Current bankroll ({{current}}) is below the recommended level ({{rec}}). Consider moving down in stakes to reduce risk.
bankroll.sdTip: SD = √( Σ(Ri − R̄)² / (n−1) ). Measures volatility across tournaments.
bankroll.ciTip: CI = R̄ ± 1.645 × (SD / √n). Expected range for average P/L per tournament.
bankroll.rorTip: RoR = exp(−2 × WR × BR / SD²). Probability of going broke.
bankroll.maxDDTip: Max DD ≈ Z² × SD² / (4 × WR), with Z = 2.33 (99%).
bankroll.winrateTip: Mean(P/L) across tournaments in the selected range.
bankroll.clearConfirm: Delete ALL your sessions? This cannot be undone.
